summary: Completed comprehensive testing of USA.edu Student Application Portal. All backend APIs (18/18 tests passed) and frontend UI flows working correctly. Key features tested: user registration with automatic advisor assignment, login, dashboard with enrollment advisor card, multi-step application form, and employment history verification.

issues: Minor: ESLint warning about useEffect dependencies in Dashboard.js - not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: ESLint warnings in Dashboard.js and ApplicationForm.js about missing useEffect dependencies - consider adding eslint-disable comment or fixing dependencies
seed_data_creation: Created test users during testing for registration and application flows
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_usa_edu_api.py cover auth, advisor, applications, and employment history. Frontend tested via Playwright - login, dashboard, enrollment advisor card, application form steps 1-3, employment verification form.

features_tested.user_registration_with_advisor_assignmen: PASS - New users automatically assigned enrollment advisor on signup
features_tested.login_flow: PASS - Login with email/password works correctly
features_tested.dashboard_enrollment_advisor_card: PASS - Shows advisor name, avatar, title, specialization, and 4 action buttons

enrollment_advisor_action_buttons.send_email: PASS - Uses mailto: with pre-filled subject

features_tested.get_advisor_endpoint: PASS - /api/auth/advisor returns advisor data for logged-in user
features_tested.application_form_personal_info: PASS - Step 1 saves personal info correctly
features_tested.application_form_academic_history: PASS - Step 2 saves academic history correctly
features_tested.application_form_employment_history: PASS - Step 3 saves employment verifications correctly
features_tested.employment_verification_persistence: PASS - Employment verification data persisted through API
